TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Qba, title = Qba, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qba} }

S.FORM: Qba Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Qba a niyaro', 37 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 90 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 37% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 33 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 63% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 57 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal34%, Truku2%, roma1%.
S.PHON: *b~b~va itiniaj i …¨~…ģato~uŇč ¶…ôn no~u ji…ĺan ko~u *b~b~va a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Qba Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Qba a niyaro', 37 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 90 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 37% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 33 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 63% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 57 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal34%, Truku2%, roma1%.
S.PHON: *b~b~va itiniaj i …¨~…ģato~uŇč ¶…ôn no~u ji…ĺan ko~u *b~b~va a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%.
